section.title: Publications and manuscripts
section.intro: I think scientific work should be communicated clearly and publicly. These are the papers and manuscripts that currently best represent my research.

items.title: CD4+ T-cells sensitize quasi-mesenchymal breast tumors lacking CD73 to anti-CTLA4 immune checkpoint blockade therapy
items.citation: Chandraganti, S., Sams, C., Sahoo, S., et al. Under review at Cancer Research Communications.

items.title: Cross-species conservation of nerve- and airway-associated interstitial macrophages (NAMs) that suppress CD8+ T-cell immunity via a C1q axis in lung cancer
items.citation: Bartnicki, E., Khanna, K. M., Brenier, E., et al., including Shiney Chandraganti. Under review at Immunity.

items.title: Synthesis and characterization of methyl acrylamide cellulose nanowhiskers for environmental applications
items.citation: Sharma, S., Chandraganti, C. S. R., and Pandey, L. M. Letters of Applied NanoBioScience, 2020.

items.title: The epithelial-mesenchymal transition drives CD73-mediated cross-protection in heterogeneous breast tumors
items.citation: Bakhle, K., Chandraganti, S., Nelissen, S., Li, L., Feng, B., Ramos-Villanueva, B., Miller, A., and Dongre, A.

items.title: Understanding the mechanism by which CD4+ T cells sensitize quasi-mesenchymal sgCD73 tumors to anti-CTLA4 checkpoint blockade therapy
items.citation: Feng, B., Sams, C., O'Connell, I., Chandraganti, S., Sahoo, S., Jolly, M. K., and Dongre, A.

items.title: Harnessing epithelial-mesenchymal plasticity in breast cancer to potentiate the effects of immunotherapy
items.citation: Nelissen, S., Salih, L., Chandraganti, S., O'Connell, I., and Dongre, A.
